## [03:03 - 04:31]

now to help me and service me? See if these considerations are handled, these other concerns, to your buyer satisfaction, price will not, will not be the biggest issue. The product or service that you're selling will obviously create different concerns for every decision maker. But trust me, regardless of what it is you sell, it almost never comes down to just price. To the degree, to the degree that you understand that price is almost never the real issue you will make money. You will be successful and you will master this thing called selling.
